description: Use this skill whenever the user wants to autonomously generate or update design documents under `DESIGN/` — new specs from a plan summary, multi-component design generation, format learning from existing specs, and self-validation via `spec-audit`. Trigger phrases include "generate the design docs", "write DESIGN/03_payment.md from scratch", "create specs for the components in this plan", "draft DESIGN markdowns from PLAN.md", "design the backend / frontend / core layer", "design phase for the new feature", "update the design docs to match the plan", or any spec-creation request driven by a plan summary or requirement description. Trigger even when the user does not say "design-phase" — phrases like "let's start designing", "I need a spec for the payment retry workflow", or "draft the architecture docs" qualify.

results.query: Generate DESIGN/*.md for the entire payment system from plans/PAYMENT.md. Components: PaymentGateway, Refund, Subscription. Use the existing format from DESIGN/01_user.md as the template.
Starting a new feature — chat. We have plans/CHAT.md with requirements but no design docs yet. Generate the component design docs autonomously and self-audit at the end.
Run design-phase on the inventory and shipping components. Generate DESIGN/05_inventory.md and DESIGN/06_shipping.md from plans/INVENTORY.md and plans/SHIPPING.md respectively.
I have a plan summary in plans/NOTIFICATION.md and need design docs for 3 new components (push, email, sms). Use the existing DESIGN/ format and self-audit at the end.
spin up design docs for the new auth refactor pls. plans/AUTH-REWRITE.md has the requirements and i want the same format as the existing DESIGN/*.md files
Generate design documents for all components in this fresh project. Use DESIGN/template.md as the format reference and run spec-audit at the end to catch matrix inconsistencies.
We're starting Phase 1 of dev-pipeline for the order management system. Need 4 component design docs from plans/ORDER-MGMT.md (Order/OrderItem/Cart/Checkout).
new project from scratch, no design docs yet. generate them from plans/REQUIREMENTS.md with self audit
Run /design-phase --from-scratch on the search component. plans/SEARCH.md has the requirements, no existing DESIGN/ doc yet for it.
I have requirements for 5 components and want all the design docs generated in one pass with self-audit. Use the existing format style (DESIGN/01_*.md) as the reference for headings and tables.
Fix the divergence between DESIGN/03_order.md and src/order/. The implementation has 3 fields the spec doesn't mention. Sync them up using the heuristics.
Update DESIGN/01_user.md to add a new field `lastLoginAt` to the User type. Just one small edit.
DESIGN/05_inventory.md is finalized. Implement the component end-to-end with the 6-stage process — type checks, tests, parallel review.
Help me design a database schema for a multi-tenant SaaS app — what's the recommended approach with row-level vs schema-level isolation?
Audit the existing DESIGN/ docs for type name inconsistencies and API contract drift between docs.
Convert this UML class diagram to a Mermaid diagram for the README.md.
Write a small Python script that generates test data for the user registration flow — 1000 fake users with realistic email/name pairs.
spec-check found 8 Constraint violations between DESIGN/02_payment.md and src/payment/. Fix them — spec wins for type names, impl wins for behavior.
Add a new section to README.md describing the deployment process to staging and production.
Edit DESIGN/01_user.md and add the email field to the User type. Single field, single doc.
